data.title: Tesla's Refreshed Model Y Rolls Off Shanghai Gigafactory, Deliveries To Start 'Soon'
data.description: EV giant Tesla said on Monday that deliveries of its refreshed Model Y vehicle manufactured at its gigafactory in Shanghai will start "soon."

data.title: Xi Jinping's Supportive Appearance Sparks Chinese Tech Rally For Second Day: Alibaba, Xiaomi Surge Over 4% On Hong Kong Exchange
data.description: Chinese technology stocks extended gains Tuesday, as investors continued to react to President Xi Jinping's supportive stance toward the private sector demonstrated at Monday's high-level business symposium.

data.title: Elon Musk's X Blocks Links To Signal App As Federal Workers Turn To Encrypted Messaging Amid DOGE Fallout: Report
data.description: X, formerly Twitter, is blocking links to Signal.me, a URL shortener for the encrypted messaging app Signal, as federal workers increasingly turn to the platform amid mass layoffs tied to a cost-cutting initiative backed by Elon Musk.

data.title: PEPE Shrugs Off Memecoin Declines As Whales Load Up On Coins: Here's Why This Analyst Thinks The Frog-Themed Crypto Could Rally 30-35%
data.description: Frog-themed cryptocurrency Pepe (CRYPTO: PEPE) defied the broader slump in the meme coin market to post gains on Monday.

data.title: Peter Schiff Warns Of 'Slow-Motion Train Wreck' Financial Disaster That's On No One's Radar
data.description: Japanese government bond yields reached a new 15-year high on Tuesday, climbing to 1.40% as strong economic growth data fueled expectations of further monetary tightening by the Bank of Japan.
